top_findings.title: Deliverable source, tests, and README absent from archived run
top_findings.evidence: find in run_dir returns only 8 metadata files (TASK.md, stack.json, scores.json, _meta.json, logs, empty .coverage) — no app.py, test_app.py, README.md, or requirements.txt; sibling rep1 archives all of these. .coverage exists but its file/line_bits/arc tables have 0 rows. Yet scores.json reports test_coverage=0.99, defect_rate=1.0 and _agent_stdout.log claims '16/16 passed', so the code existed and was scored but was not archived.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix the runner so the workspace is archived before any post-run cleanup (likely the stack-reload hook, commit 131fbb8) wipes it; the run is unverifiable and non-reproducible as archived.
